title: Text cuts out on a Single Select Question on forms, if the option is long
excerpt:
Description
If the text is long on the option of a single select question, the text is not fully visible. If you hover on the option, that’s when the full text becomes visible. 
What are you trying to achieve
The whole t…

posts.author: akonsadbin (Abdul Taiab Akon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

If the text is long on the option of a single select question, the text is not fully visible. If you hover on the option, that’s when the full text becomes visible.

What are you trying to achieve

The whole text should be visible. If the text is long, it should wrap text and move to the next line

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @akonsadbin

Our monday app Easyform displays single and multi-select options (i.e. Status/ Dropdown/ Connected boards ect) in wrap, both as a list of radio buttons and as dropdown options.

You can check out our documentation here. If you want help setting up or have any questions, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com or book a call with us here.
